events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-founder of The Beatles, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Paul McCartney Birthday
angles.copy: Sir Paul McCartney turns 84 today, a living legend whose music with The Beatles and as a solo artist continues to shape generations. What's your favourite McCartney moment?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Alison Moyet Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! From Yazoo to her powerful solo career, her voice is truly unmistakable.

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy Award-winning singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Lionel Richie Birthday
angles.copy: Hello! Is it Lionel Richie's 77th birthday we're looking for? Yes it is! Celebrating the smooth icon today.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Iconic American singer and actress Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Cyndi Lauper Birthday
angles.copy: Girls just wanna have fun, and Cyndi Lauper certainly has for 73 years! Happy birthday to the vibrant pop icon.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the hugely influential British singer-songwriter George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: George Michael Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His incredible talent and unforgettable songs live on.

events.title: 17th Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who died on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: Michael Jackson Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 17 years since we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's influence on music and culture remains as monumental as ever.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo Starr Birthday
angles.copy: Peace and love to Ringo Starr, who celebrates his 86th birthday today! The legendary Beatles drummer still keeps the beat going.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic lead guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! His iconic riffs have rocked the world for decades.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger, rock and roll's most enduring frontman.

events.title: 45th Anniversary of MTV Launch
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: On this day, we acknowledge the release of Oasis' iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe', which officially dropped on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Oasis Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: On this day, we're looking back to 1994 when Oasis released their monumental debut album, 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track?

events.title: 57th Anniversary of Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people converged for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history.

events.title: 49th Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Remembering the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years since his passing. His music continues to shake, rattle, and roll.

events.title: 30th Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Shooting
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, leading to his death on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac Shakur Anniversary
angles.copy: 30 years today since the music world was rocked by the shooting of Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and legacy continue to resonate.

events.title: 56th Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, the legendary guitarist who passed away on September 18, 1970, with today marking a significant anniversary of his loss.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago today. The guitar legend's innovative sound changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' Anniversary
events.blurb: On this day, we look back at The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road', which was originally released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Beatles Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: On this day, we're reflecting on The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, originally released in 1969. That zebra crossing still draws a crowd!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The influential frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the formidable Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders frontwoman, still rocking after all these years.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: British singer and former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single release
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on this day in 1975, four years after its US debut.

angles.name: John Lennon Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1975. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever.

events.title: 25th Anniversary of the First iPod
events.blurb: On this day, we mark the 25th anniversary of the first iPod, which was unveiled by Apple on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: First iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. It completely changed how we listen to music – fitting 1,000 songs in your pocket!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first 007 film, Dr. No, on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and decades of iconic films, gadgets, and unforgettable theme songs.
